hero.title: AI Through a Moroccan Lens
hero.subtitle: Exploring the intersection of artificial intelligence and Moroccan cultural identity

intro.title: Bridging Technology and Tradition
intro.description: Our project combines cutting-edge AI technologies with Morocco's rich cultural heritage to create something truly unique.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: We aim to explore and showcase the beautiful intersection between artificial intelligence and Moroccan cultural identity.

phases.title: Research Phase
phases.description: Studying the cultural elements that define Moroccan identity.

phases.title: Development Phase
phases.description: Creating AI models trained on Moroccan cultural data.

phases.title: Implementation Phase
phases.description: Building applications that showcase the fusion of AI and Moroccan culture.

phases.title: Exhibition Phase
phases.description: Sharing our work with the world through exhibitions and online platforms.
